strategy_summary: Lichen attach to rocks via a central holdfast (umbilicus). “The umbilicus is of vital importance for the Umbilicaria species, since it fastens the thallus to the rock.” (Gauslaa 1984:20)
mechanism:
Lichen attach to rocks via a central holdfast (umbilicus).

“The umbilicus is of vital importance for the Umbilicaria species, since it fastens the thallus to the rock.” (Gauslaa 1984:20)
